title: centaurea parlatoris
intro: Centaurea parlatoris, also known as Star of Italy or Montpellier cornflower, is a perennial flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea parlatoris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
